indicators.name: hard floor
indicators.rationale: A hard floor is uncomfortable and noisy, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: no bed
indicators.rationale: No bed or other horizontal rest surface is present, making sleep impossible.

indicators.name: no windows
indicators.rationale: No windows for light control or ventilation, which are important for sleep.

indicators.name: no furniture
indicators.rationale: No furniture to provide a resting place or support for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for sleep (Primary). There is no bed or other horizontal rest surface, no windows for light control or ventilation, and no furniture to provide support for sleep. The hard floor is also unsuitable for sleep.
